message:
fix: enable govet linter and resolve all IPv6 address format issues

Enable the govet linter and fix all IPv6-incompatible address formatting
across the codebase. Uses net.JoinHostPort() which properly brackets IPv6
addresses (e.g., [::1]:8080 instead of ::1:8080).

Also fixes context leak in RPC server and removes redundant build tags.

Based on PR #1429 by matta, with remaining IPv6 fixes completed.

Co-Authored-By: matta <matta@users.noreply.github.com>
